name: CODEXIS, INC.
business: Codexis provides technology solutions to improve therapeutics manufacturing using its proprietary CodeEvolver directed evolution technology platform to discover, develop, enhance, and commercialize novel, high-performance enzymes. The company focuses on two key areas: its ECO Synthesis manufacturing platform for large-scale manufacture of RNAi therapeutics, and its small molecule pharma biocatalysis business for improving efficiency in small-molecule manufacturing. Additionally, it develops customized enzymes for molecular biology applications such as mRNA manufacturing, next generation sequencing, and diagnostics.

exposures.sentence: Our ECO Synthesis manufacturing platform is comprised of enzymatic tools and processes that are designed to enable large-scale manufacture of RNA interference (RNAi) therapeutics.

In our small molecule pharma biocatalysis business, we utilize our CodeEvolver technology platform to develop optimized enzymes that are used by some of the world's largest pharmaceutical companies to improve the efficiency and productivity of their manufacturing processes for small molecule therapeutics.

we have also applied our CodeEvolver technology platform to develop customized enzymes for customers across other molecular biology applications, such as template dependent mRNA manufacturing, next generation sequencing, diagnostic testing and DNA oligonucleotide synthesis.

catalysts.event: Advance at least one CDMO partnership to technology transfer
catalysts.sentence: In each of these agreements, we are currently in the feasibility testing stage and expect to advance at least one of these partnerships, including initiating a technology transfer to that organization, in 2026.

catalysts.event: Begin construction of GMP manufacturing facility in Hayward, California
catalysts.sentence: We anticipate beginning construction in the fall of 2026, with the facility in full production capability by the end of 2027.
